title: I indexed 669 GB of my GoPro videos using my M1 Max computer and local ML models
summary: The author indexed 2,207 GoPro videos (669 GB) on an M1 Max using local open-source ML models to find and extract cycling highlights. The project enables searching for moments and sending clips directly to DaVinci Resolve, showcasing a practical, privacy-focused application of ML for personal video indexing.
